text.title: langchain-observability Instrumentation Procedure
text.summary: Five steps from runtime-profile.yaml to a validated tracing-config + env snippet.

step.name: parse-runtime-profile
step.action: Load YAML; coerce types; reject if pii_posture or latency_target_ms missing.

step.name: select-streaming-and-sampling
step.action: latency≤500 → streaming=true. cost≤$0.01 → sample_rate=0.1 with tail-based-error keep; else sample_rate=1.0.

step.name: emit-env-and-callback
step.action: Render templates/tracing-config.env + templates/structured-callback.py; force redact_payloads=true when pii_posture≠public.
